creator: mi@video-collage.com
text:
The currently available x11-toolkits/qt142 is quite old -- the
	latest (among 1.x) from the Troll is 1.45, and, according, to
	the changes-* files, there is quite a number of bugs fixed.

	This port builds the Qt with gif support turned on.

	Since qt142 is a separate port, I made this one separate too --
	qt145, but it should, probably, simply replace the qt142.
